parameters.query: SELECT source_name, source_url, search_keywords, jurisdiction FROM config_tender_sources WHERE active = TRUE;

parameters.body: ={"model":"sonar","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Find recent government tenders in Australia for traffic management equipment, portable boom barriers, traffic control devices, road work safety equipment, and temporary traffic management. Include tenders from AusTender, NSW eTendering, and Victorian government procurement. Focus on tenders opened in the last 14 days. Return details: title, issuing authority, value estimate, close date, reference number."}]}

={"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":2000,"system":"Extract tender opportunities relevant to TAS (Traffic & Access Solutions, sells PB4000 portable boom barriers and MINIBOOM TZ30). Score relevance 0-100. Return JSON array: [{\"title\": \"...\", \"issuing_authority\": \"...\", \"jurisdiction\": \"...\", \"category\": \"traffic_management|road_works|events|infrastructure\", \"estimated_value\": N or null, \"close_date\": \"YYYY-MM-DD\" or null, \"external_id\": \"...\", \"relevance_score\": N, \"fit_analysis\": \"...\"}]. Only include tenders with relevance_score >= 40.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Tender research output: " + JSON.stringify($json)}]}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO tenders (source, external_id, title, issuing_authority, jurisdiction, category, estimated_value, close_date, relevance_score, fit_analysis, detected_by) VALUES ('{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.external_id}}', '{{$json.title}}', '{{$json.issuing_authority}}', '{{$json.jurisdiction}}', '{{$json.category}}', {{$json.estimated_value || 'NULL'}}, {{$json.close_date ? "'" + $json.close_date + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.relevance_score}}, '{{$json.fit_analysis}}', 'agent') ON CONFLICT (source, external_id) DO UPDATE SET relevance_score = EXCLUDED.relevance_score, updated_at = NOW();

meta.description: Tuesday 5:30 AM — scans government tender portals for traffic management opportunities. Scores relevance and stores in tenders table.
